hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const fp=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||(j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath)||'';if(!fp.endsWith('TaskCard.tsx'))return;const lines=fs.readFileSync(fp,'utf8').split('\n');const idxs=lines.reduce((a,l,i)=>(/^export default TaskCard;?$/.test(l.trim())?[...a,i]:a),[]);if(idxs.length>1){const filtered=lines.filter((_,i)=>!idxs.slice(0,-1).includes(i));fs.writeFileSync(fp,filtered.join('\n'))}}catch(e){}})" 2>/dev/null || true
